name: PT Pan Brothers Tbk
summary: PT Pan Brothers Tbk, together with its subsidiaries, develops, manufactures, and supplies garments. It offers woven garments, such as padded and light weight jackets, pants, shorts, casual pants and dress shirts, etc.; technical, functional, and active wear jackets for snow boarding, ski outer wear, active wear, jogging, hiking, other sports and outdoor activities, etc.; and cut and sewn knit garments, including polo shirts, golf shirts, track suits, and sweat suits, as well as various fabric products. The company also provides garment printing and embroidery services. It exports its products to the United States, European Community, Eastern Europe, Canada, Asia, Australia, New Zealand, and internationally. The company was founded in 1980 and is headquartered in Tangerang, Indonesia.
